title: pelargonium capitatum
intro: Pelargonium capitatum, also known as the Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium capitatum include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory infections, as well as its potential to help lower blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium capitatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
